data warehouse consolidation.text: Three Questions a CFO Should Answer Before Connecting Financial Data to an LLM | by The Variance | Jun, 2026  Medium

summary: CFOs should consider data quality, regulatory compliance, and business context before connecting financial data to an LLM.
CFOs should ask themselves three questions: What data do I need to connect to the LLM? How will I ensure data quality? What are the regulatory implications?
The article emphasizes the importance of careful consideration and planning before integrating financial data with AI/LLM technology.
